opportunities.title: Digital Analytics & Tracking Consultant | German- & English-Speaking (m/f/d) | GA4, GTM & eCommerce | 100% Remote | Full- or Part-Time
opportunities.description:
We are a digital marketing agency looking for a Digital Analytics Consultant to support our team and eCommerce clients, particularly in the following areas:

  • Implementation and optimisation of GA4 tracking
  • Client-side and server-side Google Tag Manager
  • Consent Management Platforms (CMPs)
  • Ideally, tracking implementations in combination with Shopify

We are open to both freelancers and candidates seeking permanent e

opportunities.title: [HIRING] 1–2 Video Editors for Ongoing Client Projects | Salary at Market Rate (Negotiable)
opportunities.description:
[HIRING] 1–2 Video Editors for Ongoing Client Projects | Salary at Market Rate (Negotiable)

I want to hire 1 or 2 video editors for my client based video editing work. Salary - up to market rates (negotiable according to your expertise) Please DM me and I'll share the contact details for further discussion.   submitted by   /u/Ritikapambi [link]   [comments]
